hero.titleLine1: From a short description to a live ERP — automatically.
hero.subtitle: Describe your business in plain language. We model the modules, workflows, and data so you can ship without a dev team.

tagline.line2: We translate that into entities, rules, and screens you can use.
tagline.line3: Hours to a working system — not months of bespoke development.

howItWorks.heading: Three Simple Steps
howItWorks.step1Body: Tell us about your operations in plain language. No technical knowledge required.
howItWorks.step2Body: Our AI analyzes your needs and creates the perfect ERP structure automatically.
howItWorks.step3Body: Get a ready-to-use container with your custom ERP system.

video.heading: See the platform in action
video.body: Take a short tour and watch CustomERP turn a plain description of your business into a fully working ERP system in minutes.
